description: Upgrade plan to migrate Java project to latest LTS versions

tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to version 21, update build configuration files (pom.xml or build.gradle) to target Java 21, address any deprecated APIs or breaking changes introduced in newer Java versions
tasks.taskSummary: Upgraded Java from 1.8 to 21 by updating pom.xml properties (java.version, maven.compiler.source, maven.compiler.target). Build and unit tests pass successfully.

tasks.description: Upgrade Spring Boot to version 3.4 (latest stable)
tasks.requirements: Upgrade Spring Boot to version 3.4, Spring Framework to 6.x, migrate javax.* packages to jakarta.* namespace, update Spring Boot starter dependencies, address any configuration changes or deprecated features
tasks.taskSummary: Upgraded Spring Boot from 2.7.18 to 3.4.4, Spring Framework to 6.x, migrated javax.* to jakarta.* namespace, replaced ojdbc8 with ojdbc11. Build and unit tests pass successfully.

tasks.description: Upgrade project dependencies to latest compatible versions
tasks.requirements: Update all third-party dependencies to versions compatible with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4, resolve any dependency conflicts, ensure no known security vulnerabilities in updated dependencies
tasks.taskSummary: Updated commons-io from 2.11.0 to 2.21.0 (latest stable). Spring Boot BOM-managed dependencies (ojdbc11, H2) are already at their latest BOM versions. No security vulnerabilities found. Build and unit tests pass successfully.
